Uses of Class
neqsim.process.materials.MaterialServiceEnvelope

Packages that use MaterialServiceEnvelope
Package
Description
neqsim.process.materials
Process-wide materials selection, degradation, and integrity lifetime review utilities.

    Description
    private MaterialServiceEnvelope
    MaterialReviewItem.serviceEnvelope
    Service envelope used for mechanism selection and calculations.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    StidMaterialsDataSource.copyDirect(com.google.gson.JsonObject record, MaterialServiceEnvelope envelope, String sourceKey, String targetKey)
    Copies one field under a normalized target key.
    private double
    MaterialsReviewEngine.fractionValue(MaterialServiceEnvelope service, String... keys)
    Reads a fraction from mole fraction or percent-style fields.
    private void
    StidMaterialsDataSource.mergeObject(com.google.gson.JsonObject record, MaterialServiceEnvelope envelope, String objectKey)
    Merges a nested JSON object into a service envelope.
    private void
    MaterialsReviewEngine.runAmmonia(MaterialServiceEnvelope service, MaterialReviewResult result, String material, double temperatureC, double pressureBara)
    Runs ammonia compatibility screening.
    private void
    MaterialsReviewEngine.runChlorideScc(MaterialServiceEnvelope service, MaterialReviewResult result, String material, double temperatureC, double chlorideMgL, double pH)
    Runs chloride SCC assessment.
    private NorsokM506CorrosionRate
    MaterialsReviewEngine.runCo2Corrosion(MaterialServiceEnvelope service, MaterialReviewResult result, double temperatureC, double pressureBara, double co2MoleFraction, double h2sMoleFraction, double chlorideMgL, double pH, boolean freeWater)
    Runs NORSOK M-506 CO2 corrosion when relevant.
    private void
    MaterialsReviewEngine.runCui(MaterialServiceEnvelope service, MaterialReviewResult result, String material, double temperatureC)
    Runs corrosion-under-insulation screening.
    private void
    MaterialsReviewEngine.runDenseCo2(MaterialServiceEnvelope service, MaterialReviewResult result, String material, double temperatureC, double pressureBara, double co2MoleFraction, double h2sMoleFraction, double h2MoleFraction)
    Runs dense-phase CO2 impurity and wet-corrosion assessment.
    private void
    MaterialsReviewEngine.runHydrogen(MaterialServiceEnvelope service, MaterialReviewResult result, String material, double temperatureC, double pressureBara, double h2MoleFraction, double h2sMoleFraction, double chlorideMgL, boolean freeWater, double designLifeYears)
    Runs hydrogen service assessment.
    private void
    MaterialsReviewEngine.runIntegrityLife(MaterialServiceEnvelope service, MaterialReviewResult result, NorsokM506CorrosionRate co2Corrosion)
    Runs remaining-life screening from wall thickness and corrosion rate.
    private void
    MaterialsReviewEngine.runMaterialSelection(MaterialServiceEnvelope service, MaterialReviewResult result, NorsokM506CorrosionRate co2Corrosion, double designTemperatureC, double designLifeYears, double chlorideMgL, double pH, boolean freeWater)
    Runs NORSOK M-001 material selection and stores the recommendation.
    private void
    MaterialsReviewEngine.runNelsonCurve(MaterialServiceEnvelope service, MaterialReviewResult result, String material, double temperatureC, double pressureBara, double h2MoleFraction)
    Runs API 941 Nelson curve screening when hydrogen and high temperature are relevant.
    private void
    MaterialsReviewEngine.runOxygenCorrosion(MaterialServiceEnvelope service, MaterialReviewResult result, String material, double temperatureC, double chlorideMgL)
    Runs dissolved oxygen corrosion assessment.
    private void
    MaterialsReviewEngine.runScreeningMechanisms(MaterialServiceEnvelope service, MaterialReviewResult result, String material, double temperatureC, double chlorideMgL, boolean freeWater)
    Runs direct screening checks for mechanisms that do not yet have dedicated calculators.
    private void
    MaterialsReviewEngine.runSourService(MaterialServiceEnvelope service, MaterialReviewResult result, String material, double temperatureC, double pressureBara, double co2MoleFraction, double h2sMoleFraction, double chlorideMgL, double pH, boolean freeWater)
    Runs sour-service assessment.
    MaterialReviewItem
    MaterialReviewItem.setServiceEnvelope(MaterialServiceEnvelope serviceEnvelope)
    Sets the service envelope.
    private double
    MaterialsReviewEngine.value(MaterialServiceEnvelope service, double defaultValue, String... keys)
    Reads the first available numeric value from an envelope.
